_comment: Control Tower account topology. Copy to control-tower.config.json (repo root) and fill in. ONE flight per account (the collector) — no merge flight. Each account writes its graph into <ct_database>.<schema>; for multiple accounts, each non-main account shares its control_tower and the main account's collector folds the shares in. Single account = keep only the first accounts[] entry. The helper scripts read each account's token from the env var named by its token_env (default MOTHERDUCK_TOKEN), falling back to a gitignored .env file (env_file). Set the optional md_user to that account's `SELECT md_user()` value and every script will verify it's connected to the right account — and refuse — before writing.

accounts._comment: Optional additional account (a producer). It runs its own collector and shares its control_tower; the main account's collector folds it in via INBOUND_SHARES (stamped at deploy). token_env names a different env var so the two tokens can't cross.
